_readme: Real nightly rates you have actually seen, in EUR, per person basis matching HOTEL_SPLIT.
These override the built-in estimates in check_beach.py, and rows using them are marked
as verified in the dashboard instead of showing a tilde.
Use it when you look a destination up on Booking and see what a decent mid-range room
really costs. Two forms are accepted:
The seasonal split works the same way as the estimates: high season is June to September,
or November to March for the winter-sun destinations. Peak and weekend multipliers still
apply on top, so enter a normal rate rather than a Ferragosto one.
Anything not listed here falls back to the estimate. Delete an entry to go back to the
estimate. Keys are the airport codes used in BEACH_DESTINATIONS.
Checked date is only for your own reference, nothing reads it.
